title: Malty Shaggy Rice Onigiri with Thai Chili Jam
description: Indulgent Japanese rice onigiri packed with a sweet and spicy Thai chili jam, coated in sesame and seaweed for a crunchy finish.
instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
Combine rice and water in a pot, bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Stir in rice vinegar, sugar, and salt, then cool the cooked rice to warm but not hot.
In a small saucepan, gently heat the Thai chili jam with grated ginger until fragrant and slightly thinned.
Shape the warm rice into triangles about 2 inches wide, placing a small dollop of the chili jam in the center of each.
Wrap each shaped rice ball in a triangle of nori sheet, sealing the edge with a wet finger.
Roll the wrapped rice balls in toasted sesame seeds until fully coated.
Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to two days, replenishing the jam if desired.
